column8: Sub-rounded COBBLES and GRAVELS of moderately decomposed granite and tuff with some grey, silty SAND. (ALLUVIUM)

Moderately weak to moderately strong, brownish pink spotted black and white, moderately decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE with medium to closely spaced, very narrow, rough planar, limonite and manganese stained and kaolin coated joints, dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees and 50 degrees-60 degrees.

Moderately strong to strong, greyish pink spotted black and white, moderately to slightly decomposed medium to coarse grained GRANITE with widely to medium spaced, extremely narrow, rough planar, limonite and manganese stained joints, dipping 10 degrees-20 degrees and 50 degrees-60 degrees.
